name: Computer Use Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI (GPT-4o Vision)
services.purpose: Vision-based UI understanding — screenshot analysis, element detection, action planning, multi-step reasoning for desktop automation tasks

dev.note: ~50 screenshot analyses/day, GPT-4o vision with low-res images

prod.note: ~2K screenshot analyses/day, high-res vision, multi-turn reasoning

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for continuous automation across agent fleet

services.name: Azure Container Apps
services.purpose: Agent execution environment — sandboxed desktop containers with browser/RDP sessions, action executor, screenshot capture loop, agent orchestrator

dev.note: 1-2 agent containers, manual trigger, 4 vCPU / 8GB each

prod.note: 5-10 concurrent agents, GPU-optional for faster rendering

enterprise.note: 20+ concurrent agents, dedicated workload profiles, VNET isolation

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Screenshot archive — captured UI frames, action replay recordings, session transcripts, debug artifacts for failed automation runs

services.name: Azure Container Registry
services.purpose: Agent container images — pre-configured desktop environments with browsers, Office apps, terminal tools, and automation SDKs

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Agent state and task management — automation task queue, action history, session state, execution logs, success/failure metrics

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Agent credentials — target application passwords, API keys for automated services, Azure OpenAI keys, certificate management

services.name: Virtual Network
services.purpose: Network isolation — agent containers sandboxed from production networks, controlled egress for target application access only

prod.note: NAT gateway for controlled egress, NSG rules

enterprise.note: Azure Firewall, UDR, full egress inspection

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Agent telemetry — screenshot-to-action latency, task success rates, vision model accuracy, error classification, session replay metrics

optimization_tips: Use low-resolution screenshots (768px) for initial UI analysis — only escalate to high-res when the agent needs to read small text or identify precise click targets, reducing vision token costs by 60%
Cache UI element maps per application — once a desktop layout is analyzed, store the element tree so subsequent actions skip full-screenshot analysis and use targeted region crops
Implement action batching — plan 3-5 sequential actions from a single screenshot analysis instead of re-capturing after every click, reducing GPT-4o Vision calls by 70%
Use Container Apps scale-to-zero for dev/staging — agent containers only run during active automation tasks, eliminating idle compute costs
Move screenshot archives to Cool storage after 24 hours — most debugging happens within the first day, and historical screenshots are rarely accessed
Share container images across agent instances — use a single base image with application-specific overlays to reduce ACR storage and pull costs
